room.note: convened; three axis offices read the full proceedings blind and projected the room

founder.room_effect: Graham and Maples held under pressure that verified weekly shipping, hackathon win, and reachable production users remain underwritable founder residue once deck MRR/installs are zero-weighted; Gurley/Majors and Eghbal-under-compression wait on commercial measurement without downgrading craft—leaving the adjudication residual fork on execution-vs-proof that caps confidence and widens the band.
founder.notes: Cold-start solo technical founder scored on public footprint: independently verified weekly releases for ~20 weeks, Hack-Nation infra-track win, and launch-thread production-user intimacy (sig-002/003/005). Memory fixture 71 [58,80] weighed as prior shape, not copied. Room converged that contested deck scale/MRR cannot carry underwriting and that shipping keeps diligence open; the stable fork is whether that execution residual alone clears a $100k check—priced as wider band and medium confidence, not as a founder-quality downgrade. Inside mandate: high risk appetite and shipping-over-pedigree notes; cold start not charged negative.

market.room_effect: Maples held agent-driven CI as the investable inflection and priced failed deck scale as uncertainty; Majors held that unreproducible 10x leaves the why-now magnitude undefined—leaving Market with a coherent structural premise but no cleared sizing, and the stable write-vs-wait residual caps conviction.
market.notes: Under the mandate’s ai-infrastructure/devtools pre-seed lane, the only load-bearing Market claim on file is structural why-now: LLM-agent CI regenerating fleet build steps makes content-addressed dedupe newly valuable (seat-5 held; hackathon framing in sig-003). That premise is directionally attractive and in-thesis, but sizing and competitor structure are absent from the room. Deck 3,100 installs / $18k MRR cannot proxy penetration (room convergence + sig-001 vs sig-004); registry-order compression leaves near-term captured demand thin and unverified (sig-004, sig-005). 10x remains an undefined internal benchmark (seat-4), so why-now magnitude is unpriced. Result: coherent inflection thesis without cleared TAM, clusters, or durable-category proof—neutral Market with a wide band until the diligence packet answers partner pull, protocol, and displacement.

idea_vs_market.room_effect: Adjudication left a stable write-vs-wait fork on check timing, but both poles zero-weighted uncleared deck scale and kept the agent-CI caching idea plus verified shipping/users as live residue rather than a failed-idea or pivot case; Maples/Graham held inflection-and-craft under compression while Gurley/Majors/Eghbal blocked the check on measurement integrity, not on idea death.
idea_vs_market.notes: Idea-vs-market reads the record as an intact agent-CI caching thesis with a shipping-capable solo technical founder, not as a weak idea needing a pivot. Independent craft and presence (weekly releases, Hack-Nation win, launch production users) survive after deck installs/MRR are set to non-evidence; the live residual is whether that residue clears a $100k check before billing/telemetry, which caps confidence and widens the band without flipping the idea to fails-scrutiny. Mandate fit is comfortable: EU pre-seed AI infra/devtools, cold-start in scope, shipping velocity over pedigree, $100k fast-check size.
